star_1.text: literally and I mean literally an advertisement for another game after completing a level. I get it's a free to play/pay to win game. But most games like this at least give you an ad maybe every 4 to 5 levels. Rubbish mechanics that change you trajectory even though you can clearly see where you're aiming. Aiming for the side of a brick? Not anymore, now it's a corner of a brick changing the outcome of your strategy. This game is trash.

Too many ads. You even have to watch an ad to exit the game. I can understand the ads during the games where your are trying to get additional gems, like 100 Balls, but the others are extremely annoying. It's even worse now that you have to wait 5 seconds to cancel an ad. There are too many other options to be wasting your time in this one.

All of these "physics-based" ball games are garbage. Go ahead and carefully line up your shot, just to have the game shoot the balls wherever it pleases. One ball will always take three minutes to come down and join the rest, and they magically change direction whenever they want. Terrible.

After a game crash I am no longer able to open. I tried force stopping game and I still couldn't open game. I then tried to reinstall and I can now play the game, but all my progress is gone. All the levels I had completed perfect without spending gems to get extra attempts gone. Well I'm done with this game.

I LOVE this game! it helps me relax and enjoy myself. I don't even mind spending weeks trying to pass the very difficult levels without overdoing the power ups. However, once I got past level 187 it started crashing and shutting off, and now the game WILL NOT even load again. I am not very happy with this issue and will have no choice but to uninstall and find a new game to play if this is not resolved. Very, very sad! 😞

While the game has so much potential, by mid level 180s, its damn near impossible to to complete rounds without using powerups every step of the level. You're expected to hit a dozen boxes that take over 1000 hits to complete as well as over a hundred more that take several hundred hits to destroy starting every level with a mere 50 balls. This needs a balance badly if it wants me to play again

The game has been great, but my progress did not sync when I got a new phone. I have reached out multiple times over the past 3 weeks with no response, per the help guidelines, providing the player ids on the 2 devices, etc. I will gladly update my review once the issue is fixed.

I am changing my rating from a 4 star to a 1 star. It is a fun and strategic game until you level up. As you level up, it is impossible to win without purchasing items. I would recommend you have fun while you can and then delete this game and download another bricks game once you reach the winning via money only.

It was a 5 star until about a week ago. The ads started freezing, not awarding points and shutting down. I tried updating, but that didn't help. The opening logo has changed, so I suspect the developers had something to do with the change. If it's not fixed soon, I'm deleting it.

Enjoyed this game for quite a few months. After almost reaching level 400, I firmly belive that you'll reach a point where you will be forced to watch ads or purchase power ups with real money to advance to the next level. Un-installed. Thanks for keeping me busy for a couple months.

It's fun until you get to the "pay to play" level. It's literally impossible to complete without spending money. I uninstalled once I reached it. I looked at a bunch of the negative reviews, and oddly, most have the same cut-and-paste "we'll tell our dev team" response. These people really don't care what you think. I'll be on the lookout for Neowizz games in the future just so I can avoid them.

An accidental purchase of $99.99 was made when I was playing this game and dropped my tablet. Google Play said they couldn't refund my money and to contact the developer. When I tried to call the phone number it's all in Korean and I can't understand any of the phone prompts. How am I supposed to get my refund??? Super frustrating.

Craptastic! Game becomes impossible at a certain level. I've tried it dozens upon dozens of times and even spent at least 20 saved power ups. All I can do now it be sad and uninstall. Remember when there were games you could actually finish without spending boat loads of money?

What a joke!!!! You can figure out the pattern to clear the bricks and then the next time it won't work. Then it's a pattern of every third turn, you'll be able to clear enough bricks to get further through the level. Then there's times that it'll throw your ball way off from where you were aiming. You never have a problem aiming.... but then you figure out the pattern to clear bricks...... OOPS..... YOU SUDDENLY CAN'T AIM LIKE YOU ALWAYS CAN!!!! THE GAME IS RIGGED!!!! Then there's the ADS!!!!

This game can be fun, but way too easy at first. When the difficulty starts to ramp up, so do the ads. That can be understandable, however there is no way to buy out of the ads. That is unacceptable. Make it so I can buy out of random ads!

the ads pushed for this game are the worst. the pop ups on other games do not close when the x is pressed, can last up to 45 seconds without a way to close and it routs to the play store whether you touch 5he screen or not. I downloaded this game just so i could point out their terrible marketing practices. if the game is anything like their adds, its a manipulative cash grab and figuritively cancer.

What ever happened in the last update has made the ads unbareable. When I play the 100 ball game at the end of every round I see a 5 sec ad and it's gotten to the point of shutting the game down. Most of the 100 ball stages are 30 second long and I'm working to watch another ad for the gem bonus it's ridiculous. Yes to play this game a lot now I can't stand to play it for more than one stage.

it was a fun game, when you get into the higher levels there is a pattern. two easy then one you absolutely have to use power ups to get past. on the what i call the must have power up levels. the angles and rebounds of the balls seem to change on these levels as well. come on devs, don't you make enough money off the ads, don't diminish the enjoyment of the game just to get money. stop being greedy. on level 284, can not he passed without power ups. 562 is another pay wall. Deleting until fixed

If I pay $2.99 for 300 diamonds to clear three rows and it's only 200 diamonds to clear I should be able to keep the other 100 diamonds not pay for 300 get 200 and just lose the other 100 when I've paid for them, this has happened every single time in spend money on this game, because I thought it was a glitch that eventually would be worked out, but no, I will no longer be doing that because that's not right to not give a customer what they've paid for

Once you get to levels in the mid-100s the only way to proceed is with power ups. I'd Play 100 balls until I got 10 of each, then go back to the main game. Power ups for b progress are removed and the game becomes impossible without paying. I will Delete

star_2.text: I love this game in general. However, this game really, really, really needs an aim update. I'm on level 767. Lots of hard levels in this game. The aiming is always frustrating, especially for very tricky shots. I wish there was a way to aim the shot with precision and then have a way to fire with a separate button. There have been so many wasted shots where, as soon as my finger is lifted from the screen, the shot takes a different path than selected. Please improve the aiming system!

Game is fine, doesn't lag. Not particularly challenging, but good for passing the time. One thing that set me off is the ads were pretty minimal at first, until it asks you to rate their app after a few games. After that point the annoying ads with sound between levels appear. Pretty standard for this type of game, but very dishonest to hide them until after you rate it.

Had to delete. Was a great game until level 900 or so. Then the ads started getting longer and freezing up the game. I had to exit and restart. I wasn't getting the bonus gems so progressing was taking forever. Too bad. Hopefully others have a better experience if they keep this as long as I did.

was a lot of fun at first and then you get to level 159 and it expects you to get through a 896 hit block with 65 balls...its not possible unless you buy a bunch of gems and just keep going every time you fail. I'm not spending real money on a game specifically one thats designed to make you fail so many times your only option is to pay to play. so disappointing...uninstalling

It's okay. They put the booster buttons at the bottom where you can hit them during play accidentally. There's no "Are you sure?" option so it's easy to lose gems. That is deceptive. I believe this is on purpose so that players are encouraged to purchase more. Uninstalling.

Game is fun and i like the variety of brick sizes, but the ratio of earning gems versus spending gems is horribly disproportionate. If you have to spend 200 to remove three lines, then you should be able to earn Atty least 35 for viewing a 30-second ad. The prices for purchasing additional gems is also ridiculously expensive for what you get (there's no $0.99 option, etc.). Adjust these two things and I'll adjust my rating.

sends me to an ad, the ad ends and 10 minutes later, still no x to close add, if back button is used it doesn't go back.  If there is a close on the ad instead of x, it doesn't work either. Basically can't play game, just watching ads and having to quit. Had played game for more than 1 year, no problems, now it's been days of this. Will be uninstalling the ad factory

This could be an awesome game, if there wasn't so many ads. While i know its because of the ads, that the game is offered for free. I just feel that there is no need for an ad after every game (whether you succeed or fail the level), in my opinion an ad could run every three games. I have now started to keep track of the ads, so that i don't download it.

Inappropriate ads make me want to uninstall. I love the game. It's fun to play. I get sucked in to playing level after level. However, I do NOT like that half the ads that come up are barely legal girls gyrating on a fake video chat or a cartoon girl having her clothing erased by an animated pencil. Find some better ad sponsors.

At a certain point the levels become impossible to pass; that may be on me. Biggest drawback is the Arcade mode not saving my position when i have to take a break. Even if the app remains open, it restarts from the beginning when I attempt to re-enter the app.

8/8/2019- TOO MANY game adds! it has RIDICULOUSLY gotten worse to where theres one after each completed game. STOP IT! a relaxing game, but I wish there were better information about it, like what does it mean when the balls change color, what does the gold swirly ball option do for your game? etc. ALSO Im not recieving any gifts for watching videos.

I really used to enjoy this game and even spent alot of money,I do mean alot but now there are way to many adds alot of adds and I checked it out adds take up more than there is play time and it isn't fun anymore and I've noticed it's getting like that with all the games so I think I will just spend my money on better things because all the games are just a RIP OFF any more, I feel I'm not getting what I paid for...

This game starts off being fun and becomes more challenging until level 184 and is impossible without multiple powerups. I have been on the same level for about a week and I can only imagine how hard the 2000 series levels are. I dislike everytime you end a level you have to watch a commercial weather you want 'extras' or not. Lastly I don't see any benefit of getting the extra hearts as all they seem to do is give you a different looking ball without additional power benefits. uninstalling

I love this game, but its accuracy (the balls following the shown path) is TERRIBLE, which makes it infuriating to constantly lose because your shot didn't execute as shown. The slider also tends to move when you release it, resulting in the same problem. I've recommended a number of times for them to add a confirmation step before it fires, but they haven't. So after over a year of putting up with this and waiting for improvements, I'm done getting pissed off instead of having fun. Buh'bye

The game play is simple but fun, and the effects are cool, HOWEVER... They give me an ad after every round that I play, and each round only lasts 20 seconds! Great if you like skipping ads with some game play in between.

Game ads have been hijacked by manipulative hate-filled alt-right trump propaganda. Surely developers have SOME control of what shows up inside their app? I've invested a lot of time and progress in this game (years) but I'll uninstall it inside of a week if it keeps polluting my phone with political BS. Edit: Uninstalled. Too Unbearable. Of all the games on my phone, this issue was unique to this game. Sad. I've had the game at least 3 years. Maybe 5 or more. Too bad.

Mostly fun but...the guideline that helps you aim can get way off at times. It can track up to 1mm off in either direction and when you are trying to be precise, this messes up your game. Way too many ads otherwise.

I love this game, but for goodness sake. After restarting the level 500 times because you cant beat it, it should give you the option to either skip or watch an ad to give you free lightning bolts or extra balls. I'm stuck on a level and am just about ready to uninstall the game because of it.

Need explanations on each feature does. Wasted a lot of lightening bolts and balls before I could figure out what they did. And have no idea what the arrow is that shows up every once in a while. Daily Bonus ought to be more than just 1 bolt or 1 ball.

Was the most fun game I had played in a long time. Then got to level 184. Even using power ups I've been stuck for a week. I like a challenge but 184 is just ridiculous. I see more than one review based on 184. I guess it's time to find something else to do.

star_3.text: Very fun game. I don't even mind the ads that much; they're always short. The only reason I only give it 3 stars is due to how frustrating the control is. If your finger moves in any way while pulling away, it changes the trajectory just as you're shooting and the balls go a different direction from what you intend. At the higher levels (I'm at 792) one bad shot can mean a loss, unless you're willing to spend a lot of gems. Definitely easier to play in an emulator, though.

I just started playing and I already love the game so far. The only reason I'm giving a 4 star rating is due to the short length of time I've been able to play! I'll be back. ***Edit: After have played it for a few weeks now, I felt, after hitting 50, the challenges seemed the same. For that, i had to dock an additional star. Great concept, attention grab and you may truly lose track of time.

This would be a 5 star except for the constant mandatory ads after every level. Some of the levels only take ten seconds to beat, too. Even after watching a voluntary 30 sec ad, it'll immediately hit you with another 5 sec ad. No ads in airplane mode, at least. I have no idea how the scoring works in this game, either. I hate tutorials as much as the next guy, but this game doesn't give you anything.

It's all right. I like games like this but this one, like so many games lately, starts out okay then you find yourself watching an ad between almost every level. Come on, guys! Are you trying to retire off a couple of apps or become the next tech giant? Give us good apps, charge a buck or two, throw in a freebie once in a while and show some integrity! The way app developers have been doing forever. If you can't make enough $$$ making apps move up to platform games! ALL of you guys!! Deleted.

I agree with L M the aim is not accurate, sometimes if you point directly at a certain block it will hit the one beside it instead, plus if you don't intend to buy in game purchases then this game isn't for you. After a certain point it becomes nearly impossible, if not impossible to continue. If the accuracy is fixed and you don't mind spending money on the game then go for it. I however don't find it entertaining enough to throw money down on.

Absolutely love this game but burnt out on the back to back adds. Always extended adds. Bout ready to delete if the adds don't get tamed down. I understand you need to make money but I get tired of playing 40% of the time and seeing adds 60%.

If the 100-ball challenge racked up each score instead of logging just the high score, it would even better. My 10 year old loves playing that part and i think it would be better if the score kept getting higher and higher, still keep track of the highest score of one game, have a little pop up when you break your high score. If that happens, i will definitely be changing to 5 stars!

Progress gets lost. If you close the game it will go back a few levels and levels you already passed will be back when you return. It doesn't matter much, since I really only play when I'm bored, but it's disappointing if you worked hard to pass a level and find yourself stuck there a second time.

I have loved this game for several years, a 5star. However, beginning beginning in 2025, players have been bombarded with all 1 minute long commercials. You spend more time watching commercials than on actual game play. Might delete, watching to see if anything changes.

Fun, but the controls are super aggravating. The balls frequently fail to follow the aim line, which is easy to compensate in the early levels but amazingly frustrating when you get to the higher levels. I'm going to look for a different, similar game with better controls.

Game is fun, but some levels get pretty hard after 500 or so. Daily rewards keep resetting, even when you play every day, multiple times per day. Can't get past 3 days in a row no matter how much I play, and those rewards are important for getting past the harder levels.

Fun to a point. Too many ads, and it becomes near impossible at level 257 unless you pay for extra balls. It's that or spend half your life on the arcade mode to gain 10 points here and there. I won't ever spend money on a phone game, I don't care how addictive it is.

Fix the aim and trejectory then this might be a more fun game. You aim at one spot and it hits 3-5° off one way or the other. Just when you think you figured out the aim then goes the other way. Plus have watched balls when sped up miraculously find the one hole and sling back to the bottom instead of on its correct bounce pattern.

Game is ok at first. Often the line it shows that the ball will take is wrong and after about 180 levels it become merely a bait game where you can't proceed unless you start spending money for extra balls. It's their game so if they want to make money, ok. I'll just delete the game.

I like the game ok. Kinda fun and mindless to kill the time. However I have to echo some of the other reviews saying that the pointer isn't accurate and sends your ball on a slightly different path than you want. This can be the difference between winning or losing a level. So if you're really competitive this game might not be for you. If you just want a little mindless distraction go for it.

I actually really enjoy playing this game. Getting pretty high in levels and some are impossible without spending money. I've spent a lot! Too much! Still can't get past certain levels because getting rid of 3 lines cost goes up way too fast. Thinking of deleting game.

Since starting to play this game, for the most part I find it challenging, but not yet impossible to advance without being forced to watch ads, or having to open a wallet. The main reason why I've only rated it 3 stars is the lack of in-app help files or instructions, which are desperately required for a multi-choice panel, far from self explanitory. THAT, sort of insenitivity for players, on the part of a developer is always disappointing, if not exasperating.

Very fun until level 181. After that you better believe you will not have enough balls to tale out all of the blocks without using all of the special lightning bolts or extra ball power ups you saved through the game. It was fun and relaxing then went to crazy annoying and frustrating after level 180. Gotta give people a reason to spend money by making it extremely difficult for free to play after that, I guess. Shady and uninstalling.

Very fun and addictive game. Gave 3 stars because I watch and watch and watch ads to build up gems, then will lose all but the smaller amount! I had 880 gems then the next time I played there were only 80. Just by starting another game, poof just gone!!

I really enjoy playing this game, and have been playing a long time. You need to add an option that allows you to set up where you're going to launch the balls and then confirm that's what you want before they're launched. Countless times I've had a really good game get screwed up because as I pick up my finger, it moves a little and then the balls are launched where I didn't want them. Without this option, I don't believe this could ever be a 5- star game.

star_4.text: Fun if not a bit infuriating. Bank shots, especially to the left, seem to be so far off from the projected trajectory as to make one think that instead of using a computer to calculate it, they just held out their thumb like an artist in a cartoon might do. If that doesn't make you break your phone in half, this cross between pong and breakout will consume you for many hours.

I am a big fan! My personal preference is the arcade mode! I keep trying to beat my own top level! Yes, there are ads, but all free games come with them!!! I just read the previous rating comments, and there was a lot of complaints about political ads, but I have NOT SEEN ONE!!! I do believe that the ads are geared towards what you look at and may strike your interest... I play games on my phone, so I get all sorts of different game ads!!! I thoroughly enjoy this game! It is very addictive!!!

Better than 99% of similar games. Just two small ideas would be, in arcade, it would be nice if we could begin with desired number of balls (ex, if I just want some crazy fun, I should be able to begin with 150 balls or so) and in the levels, a skip option should be available, probably at the cost of a few gems, but yeah.

Correction: there were no intrusive ads at first. Very sneaky of them. Still they aren't overbearing and it's still a really fun game. Love it a lot. No intrusive ads. Sometimes my ball will get stuck going back and forth horizontaly for several minutes and that's frustrating.

It's one of the more fun games like this. There's so many! But com'on Neowiz... Level 449?!? Really??? It's completely impossible, and needs to be removed from the list. I'd need to use at least 3 powerups before firing the first ball, to even have a remote chance. I'm basically going to have to stop playing I guess. Once you hit a brick wall, you're pretty much done, unless you're willing to spend some money. Which I'm not. Oh well, it was fun while it lasted...

This game is a great time killer. it is frustrating however that i agonize over lining up a perfect shot and then when i lift my finger the line moves slightly and my shot is ruined. i would like to see an option to enable a two step firing sequence where you press a button to fire after you are certain the shot is lined up properly.

great idea of a game... it could be more challenging though. like, the levels are obvious because if there Is a path on the right side of the screen, then you know that that's ware you have to aim... if that makes sense. just try out the game and u will see what I mean. its a good game.

The game is extremely fun, no ads at all so far! The reason why I'm giving 4 stars is because when you try to point sometimes it doesn't allow you to after a few seconds, maybe it's a cool down, not sure, either way, fun game! Recommend it for sure

I enjoy playing this when I just need a break from another game I play. It also is easy to play with one hand when I am putting my little ones to sleep. I don't enjoy all the ads after each level otherwise I do like the game.

I played this game a couple years ago and was on a really high level.. I logged back in with same credentials and had to restart.. u don't know if they wipe info for security reasons after so long or what, but I'd like to have the option of starting at previous level

I really enjoy this game... but upon reaching level 308, it now crashes every time I attempt to open the level. I opted to try arcade style instead and it worked for a few days... but now the game crashes every attempt within the first few seconds. Please fix!

great so far. haven't gone to in-depth into it. i like the graphics and interface. sound effects are good to. it's easy and slightly strategic. I'm not a video game person so I'm not looking for something extravagant. this is a good game for a guy like me.

Simple, fun, and addicting. All you need in a game to keep it going. Good game. Though it needs some more themes, different types of balls, and exciting colors. also, more options and can play with friends against other people or against friends. overall, it a good game

would have gave 5 stars but sometimes more than not the balls will release before lifting your finger which causes you to lose because it did not go in the direction you had intended sometime this has happened to me three to four times in a row during one game this is a fun game I'm just hoping that this could be fixed

This game is in the genre of Brick Breaker games, which are of course an extension of the original Breakout game, arguably the first video game ever. Therefore the concept is solid. This particular game has a few new twists and innovations in a it to make it entertaining and fun.

This WAS my go to time killer. The last update had music playing in the background of my phone during calls, while texting and surfing the web when it was left open. I had to let it go because of that.

I like the game. but recently I accidentally made a purchase on the app and I want a refund, I need help getting my money back. I would like a refund please and I'll give a 5 star rating because I do like this game. it was an accident. I hope you guys review these comments because I seriously need help 200 bucks were not intentionally spent it was an accident l.

Love the game. Dont like the fact after you do good clear a bunch of lines its like the game penalizes you and drops several more lines backing you up. Also needs some bonus/feature to set the ball launch point or bonus to flip the board vertically for more interesting points

At of all ball breaker games I've downloaded (6) THIS is so far the best. Runs smooth, powerups are more diverse, multiplayer, just overall a step up from the rest. Would give 5 if there's ad removal.

Love the game! Only just started playing, so haven't really found any glitches ;) but it's very relaxing, believe it or not, a bunch of balls bouncing around faster than the eye can see, and I'm calm. Love it!!

star_5.text: Addicting! I've been playing for a couple months. On level 270. Have not and will not ever pay for rubies. Just keep trying! I do wish there were instructions. I don't really understand the bombs and wish i knew how you earn rubies. As for ads I don't watch them.. just hit the "back" button on my phone and it skips them. Or turn off wifi.

Very addicting game and very mind satisfying. But it also has a few flaws in it. The big issue is with the screen that has several touch sensor buttons to buy different kinds of advantages. If you accidentally touch any of them, you buy that advantage right away. It's not asking you if you are sure you want to buy it, or not, and you can't return it. And once you're at the higher levels, it becomes harder to play, not only naturally, but also it doesn't let you shoot the balls how it used to be.

I am on level 407 so it is possible. I have had earn powerups at times by playing arcade but that is fine too. I like the challenge of setting up good "kill" boxes where the balls get trapped and really knock down the hits needed. There is one question I have though. Sometimes there is a graphical arrow pointing right that flashes. What is its purpose? I have tried selecting it or otherwise interacting with it but no luck so far.

I like this style game. This one has the right balance of kinetic frenzy and user skill. The banner ads are unobtrusive so I just might DL the Domono"s.app. the 15sec ads are skippable. I've passed on the same game 1000 times before on 10 different games. It's not likely I will suddenly DL it. Although in a world of contradictions that's excatly how i found this game.

So far the ads have been completely optional. no ads between rounds. but you can watch them if you want to get various benefits. It's been pretty easy so far but im only on level 26 and it looks like there are hundreds so im sure it'll get tougher. * there is a banner ad that's up pretty much all the time but its not bothersome. I prefer it over ads between rounds that you have to watch

A fun, albeit a little addictive, simple game. Haven't run into anything dumb like "In-App Purchases" or having it make you watch previews of OTHER games...YET. It's very satisfying to shoot your balls right into a deep crevice and have them knock the bottom out of the boxes 😉.

I love this game. It's challenging, but not to the point where you want to throw your phone against a wall. Not many ads to have to wait through. I'll start a game and all of the sudden I've played 10! I do have one question tho. I'm on level 147 and wondering if there are any bonus games. Like having to hit boxes 1000 times or something.

To put it straight, this is a simple concept that had been developed to be fun. There are minimal ads, and the gameplay is entertaining. The ad for the game has a great demo and invites the viewer to download the game, not demands them. Nothing else to say here!

I've been on a certain level (182) for way to long, it use to be enjoyable, it's beginning to frustrate, because I've tried every angle a person can do. I won't spend money, will not. if I can't figure this level out, I'll find another game. have a blessed day, Jeff

Pretty, colorful, another step up in the brick breaker category. I wish it was a little slower, because I enjoy seeing the numbers ratchet down the balls responding to the changes as bricks explode. But I wouldn't downgraded on that account. Definitely worth checking out.

Love this game I've been playing it for years. Watching ads gives you fair bonuses and the ads you have to watch are short. But the biggest issue I have is that now the ads contain nudity and other explicit adult content that I do not want to see. Please remove those ads or I will have to delete this amazing game that I love so much.

At first this game was easy but as you get higher in levels it becomes very challenging which I like. I rather be challenged then have it too easy. I'm on level 352 any got there only using the free items you get for playing each day.

Love the game in general. The power boosters and special weapons are devestating to the scoreboard. I have got into the level 100's in no time at all with practically no effort. With the strange experience that the harder the levels get, the more fun I have. ❤❤❤

This is a very fun and relaxing game that I love playing while listening to podcasts or watching mindless shows! I just wish there was an option to buy no ads. Maybe I just didn't find it, but the ads can be really loud when I'm listening to other things. Is that an option or can it be made one?

Well, been playing for a couple years now in my spare time only to finally check the leaderboards out of curiosity. Apparently I'm number 11 overall, so yeah, the game is pretty fun. Oh and no, it's not pay to play. I'm on level 1667 and you CAN get through them without using any powerups. However, they're pretty generous about the jewels they give you (what you use for single use powerups) from time to time.

I'm in a trance in this game. I thought it was stupid until the genius who put the ability to interact with the ad during another game , that was my instant chance to try it and since that first time I quit the other game on the spot and now I'm hooked. So simple yet so intriguing. Props to these people who created it!

Fun time waster, somewhat addictive yet easy to set down when something comes up. Ads are SKIPPABLE and SHORT unless you choose to watch a 30 second one to earn gems! Aiming is a little off, could be more accurate.

Great satisfying game! I Just started playing so the levels are easy. As long as it gets more challenging ill enjoy this game for a while. Good gameplay. Good on the eyes and simple clean layout with almost a "wooden" feel. Better than the other games that have a digital , neon, or electric feel. I highly recommend.

This game is pretty fun. Havent had too much teouble with the game. I dont know what everyome was complaining about the ads for it isnt much better or worse than any other mobile game. Over all this game is fun and addicting. Great for killing time. I would reccommend it if you like the other brick breaker games.

Great, fluid and challenging game. One observation i made was that I recently got a new phone which has a bigger screen. My old phone (Galaxy S6) was able to get more minute angles and ability to hold those angles till you release the balls (your finger would sometimes cause it to slip and youd lose that angle). No biggie, but my new phone Samsung A12 has a big screen and the game stretched to fit which means you can not hold level saving or level ending moves. Allow or change aspect ratios.
